title: 10 herbal teas to Help Elderly with Hiccups
description: Foeniculum vulgare teas, also known as fennel tea, is a popular remedy for hiccups. The tea's active compounds, including anethole and fenchone, help to relax the diaphragm and soothe the nerves, which can help to stop hiccups. The tea's anti-inflammatory properties may also reduce irritation in the throat and stomach, further contributing to hiccup relief.
